invoice_text: Invoice #NS-7730 dated 2026-06-12 for urgent facilities supplies. Department: Facilities.
support_text: No PO match found in approval extract. Email note says supplies were urgent, but approver is not identified.
expected_review_focus: Missing PO match and unclear approval.

approval_status: Business owner note present; contract approval unclear
invoice_text: Invoice #MC-445 for May advisory services. Amount exceeds monthly contract schedule.
support_text: Contract schedule shows monthly cap of $35,000. Business owner note says extra workshops were added. No change order attached.
expected_review_focus: Amount exceeds contract schedule and change order is missing.

invoice_text: Invoice #VCS-119 for clinical support services. Vendor category marked sensitive.
support_text: Approval field is blank. Prior similar invoice was routed to compliance for review.
expected_review_focus: Sensitive vendor and blank approval status.

invoice_text: Invoice #BM-882 for emergency HVAC repair after weekend outage. Department: Facilities.
support_text: Approved service ticket, receiving confirmation, and director approval are attached. PO was created after service date due to emergency exception.
expected_review_focus: Emergency exception has support and approval; reviewer should confirm policy allows post-service PO.

invoice_text: Invoice #GL-512 for expedited freight during product launch. Amount is 22% above standard freight estimate.
support_text: Business owner explains launch urgency. Freight quote comparison is attached, but controller approval is still pending.
expected_review_focus: Pending approval and variance above estimate.

invoice_text: Invoice #ASR-221 for annual software renewal. Vendor name matches contract.
support_text: Signed renewal order, purchase order, and CFO approval are attached. Amount matches approved renewal schedule.
expected_review_focus: Evidence appears complete; reviewer should verify renewal schedule and approval record.

invoice_text: Invoice #HLA-778 for external counsel support on regulatory matter. Vendor category is legal.
support_text: Matter ID and legal ops approval are attached. Engagement letter is referenced but not included in the support package.
expected_review_focus: Legal-sensitive item missing engagement support.

invoice_text: Invoice #SEG-090 for customer dinner and venue deposit. Event date changed after original approval.
support_text: Marketing VP approval is attached for the original date. Updated venue contract shows a different date and 15% higher deposit.
expected_review_focus: Support conflicts with approved event date and amount.

invoice_text: Invoice #MP-331 for corrugated packaging order. PO #PO-77821 referenced on invoice.
support_text: PO match, receiving confirmation, and approval workflow are attached. Amount matches PO.
expected_review_focus: Standard supported invoice exception note can be concise.

invoice_text: Invoice #BPC-147 for warehouse retrofit labor. Amount exceeds original estimate by $12,000.
support_text: Work completion email is attached. No signed change order or approver identity is visible.
expected_review_focus: Missing change order and approver identity for overage.

invoice_text: Invoice #CL-903 for testing supplies. Vendor is new this quarter.
support_text: Department approval and packing slip attached. Vendor onboarding approval is not included.
expected_review_focus: New vendor support missing from packet.

invoice_text: Invoice #OCS-642 for cloud usage overage. Usage exceeds budget by 31%.
support_text: Usage report and IT director approval are attached. Finance budget owner note is missing.
expected_review_focus: Budget overage needs finance owner support.

invoice_text: Invoice #LC-210 for onsite team lunch. Department: People Operations.
support_text: Receipt, attendee list, and office manager approval attached. Amount is within local approval threshold.
expected_review_focus: Low-risk supported expense; verify threshold.

invoice_text: Invoice #PSS-440 for badge-reader replacement. Work performed before PO creation.
support_text: Security incident ticket and approval attached. PO was created after work; emergency justification is included.
expected_review_focus: Post-work PO exception with emergency justification.

invoice_text: Invoice #NTP-775 for executive travel support. Multiple traveler names are redacted.
support_text: Travel policy excerpt attached. Business owner approval pending; trip purpose not visible.
expected_review_focus: Pending approval and missing business purpose.

invoice_text: Invoice #QR-101 for retained recruiting fee. Candidate start date appears one month later than contract milestone.
support_text: HR approval attached. Contract milestone support and candidate start confirmation do not match the invoice date.
expected_review_focus: Milestone mismatch between invoice and support.

invoice_text: Invoice #RA-366 for dashboard build services. Statement of work references phase two.
support_text: SOW phase two approval, delivery acceptance, and director approval are attached.
expected_review_focus: Supported services invoice; verify delivery acceptance.

invoice_text: Invoice #ST-908 for network equipment. Bank instructions changed from prior vendor master record.
support_text: Equipment receiving evidence attached. Email requests payment to a new bank account; CIO approval not clearly shown.
expected_review_focus: Changed bank details and unclear approval.

invoice_text: Invoice #HPG-812 for campaign print materials. Quantity differs from original estimate.
support_text: Marketing approval and receiving confirmation attached. Revised estimate is attached and matches invoice quantity.
expected_review_focus: Estimate changed but revised support exists.

invoice_text: Invoice #AIP-552 for replacement machine parts. Department: Operations.
support_text: PO match is present. Receiving confirmation references a different invoice number.
expected_review_focus: Receiving support has invoice-number mismatch.

invoice_text: Invoice #EIB-330 for annual insurance premium. Payment timing is earlier than prior year.
support_text: Treasury approval and policy renewal binder attached. Early-payment discount note is included.
expected_review_focus: Large amount but support appears complete; verify early-payment rationale.

invoice_text: Invoice #KDR-441 for emergency data recovery. Vendor category marked high-risk service.
support_text: Incident ticket attached. Approval extract is blank and no business owner note is included.
expected_review_focus: Emergency/high-risk service with missing approval.

invoice_text: Invoice #MOI-228 for office furniture installation. Delivery occurred across two sites.
support_text: Facilities approval attached. Receiving confirmation covers only one site; second site acknowledgement missing.
expected_review_focus: Incomplete receiving support across locations.

invoice_text: Invoice #NS-7730A for urgent facilities supplies. Similar amount and vendor to AP-1007.
support_text: PO match and director approval attached. System duplicate check flags AP-1007 as possible duplicate.
expected_review_focus: Possible duplicate invoice despite support.

invoice_text: Invoice #VCG-650 for policy remediation advisory. Vendor category is compliance-sensitive.
support_text: Compliance approval, SOW, and milestone acceptance are attached. Payment schedule matches SOW.
expected_review_focus: Sensitive vendor with complete support; reviewer should preserve audit trail.
